differential_diagnoses: Chronic portal vein thrombosis with cavernous transformation
next_steps: CT angiography (CTA) or MR angiography (MRA) of the abdomen to evaluate mesenteric vessel patency and bowel ischemia
Hypercoagulability workup (JAK2, Factor V Leiden, Protein C/S, Antithrombin III)
Liver biopsy to assess for Symmers' (pipestem) fibrosis versus cirrhosis
Nutritional support and specialized assessment for intestinal ischemia
Consultation with vascular surgery regarding the feasibility of portal vein recanalization or bypass
